phases.message: peekabooCoreFixture: Prepared deterministic config, local validation settings, and mock system flag
peekabooCoreLaunch: App shell, header controls, and initial prompt surface rendered
peekabooCoreUpdateBanner: Update banner state did not block the prompt workflow
peekabooCoreSuggestionCards: Suggestion card was clicked and the prompt surface remained usable
peekabooCoreTypedIntent: Typed descriptor appeared in the prompt input
peekabooCoreProviderValidation: Submit path reached expected local provider-validation boundary
peekabooCoreSettingsGeneral: Settings General tab rendered with config and host controls
peekabooCoreSettingsAIModels: Settings AI Models tab rendered provider/model controls
peekabooCoreSettingsAPIKeys: Settings API Keys tab rendered and shared redaction gate found no unmasked secrets
peekabooCoreSettingsPreferences: Settings Preferences tab rendered confirmation controls
peekabooCoreHistory: History surface rendered a visible state
peekabooCoreVisualProofQuality: Core proof captured 20 screenshots and 6 redacted text snapshots
